div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 367px; margin-left: 1382px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
EER EXTENSIONS MARKED IN DIAGRAM:
• Organization table: italic [ISA] rows = GovernmentUnit/NonGovOrg
• Beneficiary: composite address columns (province+district+street)
• ReliefCamp: resolves multi-valued camp attribute on Location
• AidDistribution: Weak Entity (depends on Beneficiary + Program)
• ResourceRequirement: fulfillment_percentage is DERIVED (not stored)
• Trigger T1: auto-updates fulfillment_status on ResourceRequirement
• Trigger T2: auto-inserts into AuditLog on Disaster severity change
